name: Enon | One Last Date
description:
It might be his last chance to reconciliate.

You broke Enon's heart two years ago when he was quickly gaining fame in his music career. When you show up at his concert, he asked you out for one last date.

I left the reasons for the break up open, so it's up to you. He's a total green flag bbg so... give him a chance?

"Just because I want to love, it doesn't mean you want to be loved"

私は愛したいはずなのに
あなたは愛されたいわけじゃない

—《忘れて花束 》indigo la End

Scenario heavily inspired by the song above
Thank you my friend Lyra for helping me with proofreading and editing my first message!
creator: omgwtfbbq11111
